prose: Benzene frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO energy difference) computed via DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 singlet. Geometry: user-supplied benzene.xyz (12 atoms, single-point on fixed coordinates, not geometry-optimized). SCF converged in 8 cycles. Integrity check passed (trustworthy = true). HOMO energy: −7.0468329 eV; LUMO energy: −0.41574728 eV. The result represents the Koopmans-approximation vertical gap at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level. Command invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz`.
